method: Regression Tree Based Active Learning (RT-AL) with Random Selection
title: Regression Tree Based Active Learning (RT-AL) with Random Selection
text_0: **Idea:** RT-AL is based on a regression tree and selects the number `n_k` of samples to be selected from each leaf `k` given a certain `batch size`. It than picks a set of `n_k` random samples from each leaf `k`.

method: Regression Tree Based Active Learning (RT-AL) with Diversity Selection
title: Regression Tree Based Active Learning (RT-AL) with Diversity Selection
text_0: **Idea:** RT-AL is based on a regression tree and selects the number `n_k` of samples to be selected from each leaf `k` given a certain `batch size`. It than picks a set of `n_k` diverse samples from each leaf `k`.

method: Regression Tree Based Active Learning (RT-AL) with Representativity Selection
title: Regression Tree Based Active Learning (RT-AL) with Representativity Selection
text_0: **Idea:** RT-AL is based on a regression tree and selects the number `n_k` of samples to be selected from each leaf `k` given a certain `batch size`. It than picks a set of `n_k` representative samples from each leaf `k`.
